label: Guestbook
summary: Renders guestbook entries and wires the sign form.
era: The comment section's gentle ancestor: a form, a list, and social obligation.

options.name: src
options.note: endpoint or JSON file; or an inline <script type=application/json>

a11y: Every entry renders as text nodes only, injected markup shows as literal text, never runs. A missing endpoint shows a friendly note. Honeypot and minimum-time traps guard an existing form.
